title: Clean Professional Studio Head And Shoulders Portrait

imagePrompts.prompt: Using the provided reference image, turn the candid train snapshot into a clean professional studio head-and-shoulders portrait of the same person. Remove the headphones, window reflection, table, thermos, book, and all train interior/background elements. Reframe from a casual off-center seated scene to a centered, front-facing crop with the subject looking straight at the camera against a plain muted blue-gray studio backdrop. Keep the same haircut, shirt-and-sweater outfit, and overall realistic photographic look, but relight it with soft even studio lighting and polished portrait retouching.
